calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets (Probate Code Section 850(A)(3))
Off Calendar Jun-14-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Hilary Lamar for Anthony Martorana and Diane Martorana (Trustees).

The Court noted that Ms. Lamar provided information regarding communication with the Attorney in Germany and what she provided to him. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Asset is under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets (Probate Code Section 850(A)(3))
Off Calendar May-13-2019 Continued To Jun-10-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Hilary Lamar for Diane Martorana and Anthony Martorana (Trustees).

Ms. Lamar stated that she gave the Attorney in Germany the information he requested, that all of the heirs at law have signed notices and acknowledgment of receipt except for this Attorney's Client, and that she sent a copy of the will and the trust to the Attorney by fax and e-mail. Ms. Lamar also stated that the sole beneficiary of the trust said that the Attorney was overwhelmed and they probably would not hear from them for a while, and that they were told they received the notice, but no one will sign the acknowledgment. The Court noted that the letter mentions the date of the hearing, that one can assume that he received it and that it would like to see something showing what Ms. Lamar sent to the Attorney. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets is continued to June 10, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. Lamar to file a declaration stating what she submitted to the Attorney and that he has not responded.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
